data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence of 'Makeup session options'. While the linked use case mentions the possibility of makeup sessions, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating how this is implemented or verified through API interactions. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence provided, as the requirement is not satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the availability of makeup session options.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
